title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: A video essay arguing that despite US dominance in chips and models, China's centralized power infrastructure and ultra-high-voltage transmission network give it a critical advantage in operating large-scale AI data centers. The analysis contrasts fragmented US regulatory structures across federal, state, and local jurisdictions with China's centralized NDRC and NEA mandates, and examines how major US tech companies work around grid constraints through behind-the-meter and off-grid solutions.
